title: Qodly Shared Datasources
description: JSON schema for shared_datasources.json — project-wide datasources shared across all Qodly pages. Top-level keys are namespace names (shared, user, UI, Qodly, etc.), each containing an array of datasource definitions. Located at Project/Sources/Shared/shared_datasources.json.

additionalProperties.description: Array of datasource definitions within this namespace.

id.description: Unique datasource name within its namespace. Referenced in pages as 'namespace:id' (e.g. 'shared:articles', 'user:connectedUser').

namespace.description: Namespace this datasource belongs to. Must match the parent key in the JSON.

dataclass.description: ORDA DataClass name for entity/entitysel types (e.g. 'Employee', 'Article').

from.description: Parent datasource ID. Used when an entity is derived from an entity selection (current element binding).

initialValue.description: Initial value on page load. Common values: '' (empty), 'all' (full entity selection), 'first' (first entity), 'empty' (empty entity), or a literal value/object.

depth.description: Relation expand depth for entity/entitysel. null = default depth.

pageSize.description: Page size for entity selection lazy loading.

events.description: Events attached to this datasource (e.g. onChange triggers a server method). Uses the same event structure as WebForm events.

schema.description: Schema definition for object-typed scalars (used by Qodly platform datasources like Location, UserLanguage).

Event.description: Event handler (same structure as WebForm events). See webform.schema.json for full documentation.

datasource.description: Datasource context. Usually a string, but can be an object for simple-action events.
